import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims=None):
        super().__init__()
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(1024, 512),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Linear(512, 256)
        )
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(768, 512),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Linear(512, 256)
        )
        self.attention = nn.MultiheadAttention(256, 8, batch_first=True)
        self.fusion = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(256*2, 256),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Linear(256, 128),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Linear(128, 13)
        )
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        # Process visual features
        visual = self.visual_proj(visual)  # [B, 256, 256]
        
        # Process text features
        text = torch.mean(text, dim=1)  # [B, 768]
        text = self.text_proj(text).unsqueeze(1)  # [B, 1, 256]
        
        # Cross-attention
        attended, _ = self.attention(visual, text, text)
        attended = torch.mean(attended, dim=1)  # [B, 256]
        
        # Combine features
        text_feat = text.squeeze(1)  # [B, 256]
        combined = torch.cat([attended, text_feat], dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Final projection
        output = self.fusion(combined)  # [B, 13]
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims=None):
        super().__init__()
        self.visual_proj = nn.Linear(1024, 512)
        self.text_proj = nn.Linear(768, 512)
        
        self.attention = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(512, 256),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Linear(256, 1),
            nn.Softmax(dim=1)
        )
        
        self.fusion = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(512, 256),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Linear(256, 13)
        )

    def forward(self, visual, text):
        # Project visual features
        visual_proj = self.visual_proj(visual)  # [B, 256, 512]
        
        # Project text features
        text_proj = self.text_proj(text)  # [B, 77, 512]
        
        # Average pool text features
        text_pool = text_proj.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Attention over visual features
        attn_weights = self.attention(visual_proj)  # [B, 256, 1]
        visual_pool = torch.sum(visual_proj * attn_weights, dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Element-wise fusion
        fused = visual_pool * text_pool  # [B, 512]
        return self.fusion(fused)

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        self.visual_proj = nn.Linear(1024, 512)
        self.text_proj = nn.Linear(768, 512)
        
        self.cross_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(512, 8, batch_first=True)
        self.attn_norm = nn.LayerNorm(512)
        
        self.gate = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(1024, 512),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        
        self.mlp = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(512, 256),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Linear(256, 13)
        )

    def forward(self, visual, text):
        # Project both modalities to common dimension
        visual_proj = self.visual_proj(visual)  # [B, 256, 512]
        text_proj = self.text_proj(text)  # [B, 77, 512]
        
        # Cross-modal attention
        attended, _ = self.cross_attn(
            query=visual_proj,
            key=text_proj,
            value=text_proj
        )
        attended = self.attn_norm(attended + visual_proj)
        
        # Feature-wise gating
        gate = self.gate(visual.mean(dim=1, keepdim=True))  # [B, 1, 512]
        gated = attended * gate
        
        # Pool and predict
        pooled = gated.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        output = self.mlp(pooled)  # [B, 13]
        
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(1024, 512),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.LayerNorm(512)
        )
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(768, 512),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.LayerNorm(512)
        )
        
        self.cross_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(512, 8, batch_first=True)
        self.gate = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(512*2, 512),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        
        self.final_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(512, 256),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Linear(256, 13)
        )

    def forward(self, visual, text):
        # Project both modalities to same dimension
        visual = self.visual_proj(visual)  # [B, 256, 512]
        text = self.text_proj(text)  # [B, 77, 512]
        
        # Cross-modal attention
        attended_visual, _ = self.cross_attn(
            query=visual,
            key=text,
            value=text
        )
        
        # Feature-wise gating
        combined = torch.cat([visual, attended_visual], dim=-1)
        gate_values = self.gate(combined)
        fused = gate_values * visual + (1 - gate_values) * attended_visual
        
        # Pool and project to output
        pooled = fused.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        output = self.final_proj(pooled)  # [B, 13]
        
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims=None):  # Make input_dims optional
        super().__init__()
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(1024, 512),
            nn.ReLU()
        )
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(768, 512),
            nn.ReLU()
        )
        
        self.fusion = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(1024, 512),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Linear(512, 256),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Linear(256, 13)
        )

    def forward(self, visual, text):
        # Process visual features (B, 256, 1024) -> (B, 1024)
        visual = visual.mean(dim=1)
        
        # Process text features (B, 77, 768) -> (B, 768)
        text = text.mean(dim=1)
        
        # Project to common space
        visual_proj = self.visual_proj(visual)  # [B, 512]
        text_proj = self.text_proj(text)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Combine features
        combined = torch.cat([visual_proj, text_proj], dim=1)  # [B, 1024]
        output = self.fusion(combined)  # [B, 13]
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims=None):
        super().__init__()
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Conv1d(256, 128, kernel_size=1),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(768, 128),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        self.adaptive_pool = nn.AdaptiveAvgPool1d(1)
        self.cross_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(embed_dim=128, num_heads=4)
        self.fusion = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(256, 128),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Linear(128, 13)
        )

    def forward(self, visual, text):
        # Process visual features
        visual = self.visual_proj(visual)  # [B, 128, 1024]
        visual = self.adaptive_pool(visual)  # [B, 128, 1]
        visual = visual.squeeze(-1)  # [B, 128]
        
        # Process text features
        text = text.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 768]
        text = self.text_proj(text)  # [B, 128]
        
        # Concatenate and fuse
        fused = torch.cat([visual, text], dim=-1)  # [B, 256]
        output = self.fusion(fused)  # [B, 13]
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(1024, 512),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Linear(512, 256)
        )
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(768, 512),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Linear(512, 256)
        )
        
        self.cross_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(256, 8, batch_first=True)
        self.gate = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(256, 256),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        
        self.final_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(256, 128),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Linear(128, 13)
        )

    def forward(self, visual, text):
        # Project both modalities to common dimension
        visual = self.visual_proj(visual)  # [B, 256, 256]
        text = self.text_proj(text)  # [B, 77, 256]
        
        # Cross-modal attention
        attended, _ = self.cross_attn(
            query=visual,
            key=text,
            value=text
        )
        
        # Feature gating
        gate = self.gate(attended)
        fused = attended * gate
        
        # Pool and project to output
        pooled = torch.mean(fused, dim=1)  # [B, 256]
        output = self.final_proj(pooled)  # [B, 13]
        
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(1024, 512),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.LayerNorm(512)
        )
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(768, 512),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.LayerNorm(512)
        )
        
        self.cross_attention = nn.MultiheadAttention(512, num_heads=4, batch_first=True)
        self.gate = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(1024, 512),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        
        self.fusion_mlp = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(512, 256),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Linear(256, 13)
        )

    def forward(self, visual, text):
        # Project both modalities to common dimension
        visual_proj = self.visual_proj(visual)  # [B, 256, 512]
        text_proj = self.text_proj(text)  # [B, 77, 512]
        
        # Cross-modal attention
        attended_features, _ = self.cross_attention(
            query=visual_proj,
            key=text_proj,
            value=text_proj
        )
        
        # Gated fusion
        combined = torch.cat([visual_proj, attended_features], dim=-1)
        gate_values = self.gate(combined)
        fused = gate_values * visual_proj + (1 - gate_values) * attended_features
        
        # Aggregate and predict
        pooled = torch.mean(fused, dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        output = self.fusion_mlp(pooled)  # [B, 13]
        
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(1024, 512),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Linear(512, 256)
        )
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(768, 512),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Linear(512, 256)
        )
        
        self.cross_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(256, 8, batch_first=True)
        self.gate = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(256, 256),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        
        self.mlp = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(256, 128),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Linear(128, 13)
        )

    def forward(self, visual, text):
        # Project both modalities to common dimension
        visual = self.visual_proj(visual)  # [B, 256, 256]
        text = self.text_proj(text)  # [B, 77, 256]
        
        # Cross-modal attention
        attended, _ = self.cross_attn(visual, text, text)
        
        # Gated fusion
        gate = self.gate(attended)
        fused = gate * attended + (1 - gate) * visual
        
        # Pool and predict
        pooled = fused.mean(dim=1)
        output = self.mlp(pooled)
        
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(1024, 512),
            nn.LayerNorm(512),
            nn.GELU()
        )
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(768, 512),
            nn.LayerNorm(512),
            nn.GELU()
        )
        
        self.cross_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(512, 8, batch_first=True)
        self.gate = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(512, 1),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        
        self.final_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(512, 256),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Linear(256, 13)
        )

    def forward(self, visual, text):
        # Project both modalities to common dimension
        visual = self.visual_proj(visual)  # [B, 256, 512]
        text = self.text_proj(text)  # [B, 77, 512]
        
        # Cross-modal attention
        attended, _ = self.cross_attn(visual, text, text)
        
        # Feature-wise gating
        gate_values = self.gate(attended)
        fused = gate_values * visual + (1 - gate_values) * attended
        
        # Pool and project
        pooled = fused.mean(dim=1)
        output = self.final_proj(pooled)
        
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims=None):
        super().__init__()
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Conv1d(256, 128, kernel_size=1),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(768, 128),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        self.adaptive_pool = nn.AdaptiveAvgPool1d(1)
        self.cross_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(embed_dim=128, num_heads=4)
        self.fusion = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(256, 128),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Linear(128, 13)
        )

    def forward(self, visual, text):
        # Process visual features
        visual = self.visual_proj(visual)  # [B, 128, 1024]
        visual = self.adaptive_pool(visual)  # [B, 128, 1]
        visual = visual.squeeze(-1)  # [B, 128]
        
        # Process text features
        text = text.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 768]
        text = self.text_proj(text)  # [B, 128]
        
        # Concatenate and fuse
        fused = torch.cat([visual, text], dim=-1)  # [B, 256]
        output = self.fusion(fused)  # [B, 13]
        return output
